payload.claim_text: Proposed curb solutions include metered parking in commercial areas and delivery windows (10am-12pm one side, 12pm-2pm other side)

records.raw_text: Metered Parking: Encourages drivers to park just as long as needed, then space is open to the next shopper. Add to commercial areas without meters. Delivery Windows: Commercial Vehicle delivery zones help businesses get deliveries and reduce double parking. 10am-12pm on one side of street, 12pm-2pm on other side of street – preserves critical afternoon parking.

records.display_name: Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service

description: Proposed SBS on Nostrand Avenue (southbound) and Rogers Avenue (northbound) from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, converting B44 Limited to SBS

9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay. B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before. Offset bus lanes for 5 miles with bus bulbs at stations from DeKalb to Church Aves. Transit Signal Priority for 3.8 miles from Flatbush Avenue to Sheepshead Bay.
SBS implementation on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue corridors from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, Brooklyn and Queens
9.3 miles from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, currently served by B44 bus route. B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue as before.
BRT project along Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, converting B44 Limited to SBS

Proposed Select Bus Service (SBS) along Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue in Brooklyn, transitioning the B44 Limited into SBS with features including offset bus lanes, bus bulbs, transit signal priority, next-generation fare collection, and station/bus branding.
Proposed Select Bus Service on Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay, replacing B44 Limited service
Proposed SBS on Nostrand Ave/Rogers Ave corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay
SBS coming to Nostrand, Rogers, and Bedford Avenues; B44 SBS replaces the B44 Limited; local route remains the same; northbound SBS on Rogers instead of New York Ave
Proposed SBS project converting B44 Limited to SBS along Nostrand and Rogers Avenues in Brooklyn, with offset bus lanes, TSP, and new stations.
Select Bus Service along Nostrand Ave and Rogers Ave corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay

Proposed SBS service on Nostrand and Rogers Avenues in Brooklyn. B44 Limited will become SBS; B44 Local will continue. Includes offset bus lanes with bus bulbs for 5 miles, transit signal priority, new low-floor buses, next generation fare collection, and branding.
Design from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy, and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd. SBS features include bus signal priority, bus lanes, pre-payment, passenger info, stations, branding.
Proposed SBS project on Nostrand Ave and Rogers Ave corridor with bus lanes, pre-payment, bus bulbs, and stations
SBS on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue from Flushing Ave to Farragut Rd, with stations at Williamsburg Bridge, Taylor St, Hewes St, and Flushing Ave
SBS project on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue from Flushing Ave to Eastern Pkwy, and Empire Blvd to Farragut Rd, with bus lanes, pre-payment, bus signal priority, and station improvements.
SBS project on Nostrand Avenue and Rogers Avenue with bus lanes, bus bulbs, fare machines, shelters, and new three-door articulated buses
